questions.question: Does MarmotProvider compute detachedGroupIds using getGroupMembers() and expose it via MarmotContext?
questions.actionable_check: Read src/marmot/client.tsx. Verify getGroupMembers is imported, useMemo computes detachedGroupIds from state.groups and pubkey, and it's included in contextValue.
questions.pass_criteria: All four elements present: import, useMemo, interface field, context value inclusion.

questions.question: Does Board accept an isDetached prop and pass it to all TaskCard instances?
questions.actionable_check: Read src/components/Board.tsx. Verify isDetached is in BoardProps interface, destructured with default false, and passed to every TaskCard render.
evidence_required: passed to TaskCard in mobile render
passed to TaskCard in desktop render
questions.pass_criteria: isDetached prop defined, accepted with default=false, passed to all TaskCard instances.

questions.question: Does TaskCard accept an isDetached prop in its interface?
questions.actionable_check: Read src/components/TaskCard.tsx. Verify isDetached is in TaskCardProps and destructured in the function signature.
evidence_required: destructured in function signature with default false

questions.question: Does page.tsx correctly derive isDetached from MarmotContext and pass it to Board?
questions.actionable_check: Read app/page.tsx. Verify DetachedBoard wrapper component uses useMarmot() to get detachedGroupIds, computes isDetached from groupId, and passes it to Board.
questions.pass_criteria: DetachedBoard wrapper correctly bridges MarmotContext to Board's isDetached prop.

questions.question: Does the detachedGroupIds computation correctly handle edge cases (no state, empty groups)?
questions.actionable_check: Read the useMemo in client.tsx. Verify it skips groups with no state (if (!group.state) continue) and handles empty groups array.
evidence_required: null state guard in useMemo loop
dependency array includes state.groups and pubkey
questions.pass_criteria: Groups without state are skipped, dependency array is correct.

mandatory_questions.question: Do all existing E2E tests pass without regression?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Run make e2e and verify the same tests pass as in baseline (110 passing).
evidence_required: E2E test output showing pass count
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: At least 110 tests pass, no new failures compared to baseline.
